headline: Data Center Confidence Cracking
detail: Headline 10 flags broad skepticism toward data center-linked Big Tech, which is the direct fundamental engine for AVGO, SMH, and CRWD. If institutional players rotate out of that theme, your most concentrated names get hit hardest. This is the single biggest narrative risk to your book right now.

headline: Samsung and SK Hynix AI Chip Mega-Investment
detail: South Korea's chip giants doubling down on AI semiconductor capacity signals the sector still has long-term believers, which is a mild tailwind for SMH and AVGO sentiment. However, it also signals more supply coming, which can pressure margins for existing players over time.

headline: China Widens Japan Export Curbs on Defense and Tech
detail: China expanding export restrictions into drone, nuclear, and defense sectors broadens the tech trade-war front. This keeps semiconductor supply chain risk elevated, directly relevant to your chip-heavy book including AVGO and SMH.

headline: U.S.-Iran Halt Attacks, Hormuz Shipping Resumes
detail: The pause in hostilities removes an acute geopolitical shock that was weighing on markets this morning. Normalizing oil flows and reduced fear premium is modestly positive for risk assets and broad market sentiment, giving SPY and QQQ a small lift today.
